title: stellularia longipes
intro: Stellularia longipes, also known as Stellaria longipes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly referred to as a long-stalked starwort. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stellularia longipes include its ability to soothe irritable bowel syndrome, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Stellularia longipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
